microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive $14M+ business impact across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, managing stakeholder alignment end-to-end.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly mirroring Nuro's model of using AI tooling to reduce manual lift across programs.

Drove cross-functional alignment across engineering, operations, and partner teams by maintaining living program trackers, clear RACI structures, and exec-ready status communications for all active resilience initiatives.

Managed dependency mapping and risk triage across 14+ concurrent workstreams, proactively escalating blockers to senior stakeholders and ensuring on-time delivery across a **portfolio of high-visibility programs**.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation as a net-new capability.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform, cutting lookup time by 83% and reducing manual research lift across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating dependencies across 140+ teams.

Drove discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built and socialized a phased roadmap to automate critical paths and reduce operational toil at scale.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and surface program insights without manual reporting.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, managing **backlog prioritization** to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilize the developer intake process across cross-functional teams.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs across the release workflow.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM workflow with structured follow-through.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile for local search performance.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks and surface actionable trends, enabling data-driven adjustments to the estimating model.
